languages.text: {n}Эоганн встречает слова хладной торговки с неожиданным одобрением.{/n} "Угнетение центральной нервной системы социально одобряемыми токсинами — любопытный ритуал мирян, в котором было бы интересно принять участие, особенно под руководством госпожи Хейдари! Не лучше ли как следует растормозить свои нервные пути, отправляясь на погибель в веселье и ажитации, чем позволить экзистенциальному ужасу поглотить себя?"

{n}Eogunn meets the Cold Trader's words with unexpected approval.{/n} "Suppressing the central nervous system with socially approved toxins is indeed a peculiar ritual of the laity, in which it would be fascinating to engage — most notably under the guidance of Mistress Heydari! Isn't it better to let loose the reins on our neural pathways and face doom with joy and excitement, than to let existential dread swallow us whole?"
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн встречает слова хладной торговки с неожиданным одобрением.{/n} "Угнетение центральной нервной системы социально одобряемыми токсинами — любопытный ритуал мирян, в котором было бы интересно принять участие, особенно под руководством госпожи Хейдари! languages.text: {n}Eogunn responde con sorprendente aprobación a las palabras de la Comerciante Fría.{/n} «Anular el sistema nervioso central con toxinas socialmente apropiadas es un curioso ritual laico en el que resultaría fascinante participar, ¡especialmente con la tutela de la maestra Heydari! ¿Acaso no es mejor soltar las riendas de nuestras neuronas y aceptar nuestro sino con alegría y emoción en vez de dejar que el terror existencial nos consuma?».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn meets the Cold Trader's words with unexpected approval.{/n} "Suppressing the central nervous system with socially approved toxins is indeed a peculiar ritual of the laity, in which it would be fascinating to engage — most notably under the guidance of Mistress Heydari! Isn't it better to let loose the reins on our neural pathways and face doom with joy and excitement, than to let existential dread swallow us whole?"

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡出人意料地赞同了冷市商人的话。{/n}“用社会认可的毒素抑制中枢神经系统，确实是教外人士的一种奇特仪式，若能参与其中，想必会很有趣，尤其还是在海达利女士的指导下！松开我们神经通路上的缰绳，带着喜悦与兴奋迎接厄运，难道不比让存在主义的恐惧将我们彻底吞没更好吗？”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn meets the Cold Trader's words with unexpected approval.{/n} "Suppressing the central nervous system with socially approved toxins is indeed a peculiar ritual of the laity, in which it would be fascinating to engage — most notably under the guidance of Mistress Heydari! Isn't it better to let loose the reins on our neural pathways and face doom with joy and excitement, than to let existential dread swallow us whole?"

languages.text: {n}Eogunn begegnet den Worten der Kalthändlerin mit unerwarteter Zustimmung.{/n} "Die Unterdrückung des zentralen Nervensystems mit gesellschaftlich anerkannten Toxinen ist in der Tat ein typischen Ritual von Laien, an dem teilzunehmen gewiss faszinierend wäre ... insbesondere unter Aufsicht von Meisterin Heydari! Ist es nicht besser, die Zügel auf unseren neuronalen Wegen schleifen zu lassen und sich dem Untergang freudig zu stellen, anstatt von Existenzängsten verschlungen zu werden?"
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn meets the Cold Trader's words with unexpected approval.{/n} "Suppressing the central nervous system with socially approved toxins is indeed a peculiar ritual of the laity, in which it would be fascinating to engage — most notably under the guidance of Mistress Heydari! Isn't it better to let loose the reins on our neural pathways and face doom with joy and excitement, than to let existential dread swallow us whole?"

Ist es nicht besser, die Zügel auf unseren neuronalen Wegen schleifen zu lassen und sich dem Untergang freudig zu stellen, anstatt von Existenzängsten verschlungen zu werden?"

languages.text: {n}Eogunn accueille les propos de l'adepte du Commerce Froid avec un enthousiasme inattendu.{/n} « L'anesthésie du système nerveux central avec des toxines socialement acceptées est effectivement un rituel propre aux profanes, et il serait fascinant de tenter l'expérience, surtout sous la supervision de maîtresse Heydari ! N'est-il pas préférable de lâcher la bride à nos circuits neuronaux pour braver la mort dans la liesse plutôt que de nous laisser submerger par nos angoisses existentielles ? »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn meets the Cold Trader's words with unexpected approval.{/n} "Suppressing the central nervous system with socially approved toxins is indeed a peculiar ritual of the laity, in which it would be fascinating to engage — most notably under the guidance of Mistress Heydari! Isn't it better to let loose the reins on our neural pathways and face doom with joy and excitement, than to let existential dread swallow us whole?"

N'est-il pas préférable de lâcher la bride à nos circuits neuronaux pour braver la mort dans la liesse plutôt que de nous laisser submerger par nos angoisses existentielles ? »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, Soğuk Tacir'in sözlerini beklenmedik bir onayla karşılıyor.{/n} "Merkezî sinir sistemini sosyal olarak onaylanmış toksinlerle baskılamak gerçekten de ruhban dışı sınıfın kendine özgü bir ayinidir. Buna dâhil olmak, özellikle de Üstat Heydari'nin rehberliğinde çok büyüleyici olurdu! Sinir yollarımızın dizginlerini serbest bırakıp kıyametle neşeyle ve heyecanla yüzleşmek, varoluşsal dehşetin bizi yutmasına izin vermekten daha iyi değil midir?"
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn meets the Cold Trader's words with unexpected approval.{/n} "Suppressing the central nervous system with socially approved toxins is indeed a peculiar ritual of the laity, in which it would be fascinating to engage — most notably under the guidance of Mistress Heydari! Isn't it better to let loose the reins on our neural pathways and face doom with joy and excitement, than to let existential dread swallow us whole?"

languages.text: エオグンは冷酷な商人との言葉に予想外の賛同を示す。「社会的に認められた毒を使って中枢神経系を抑制するのは、確かに一般人の奇妙な儀式だ。特にヘダリー女史の指導の下で参加するのは興味深いだろう。存在の恐怖に飲み込まれるよりも、神経回路の抑制を解き放ち、喜びと興奮を持って運命に直面した方が良いのではないか？」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn meets the Cold Trader's words with unexpected approval.{/n} "Suppressing the central nervous system with socially approved toxins is indeed a peculiar ritual of the laity, in which it would be fascinating to engage — most notably under the guidance of Mistress Heydari! Isn't it better to let loose the reins on our neural pathways and face doom with joy and excitement, than to let existential dread swallow us whole?"
